entity.description: Spike; an ear of corn, a convert at Rome whom Paul salutes (Rom. 16:9).

nodes.description: Spike; an ear of corn, a convert at Rome whom Paul salutes (Rom. 16:9).

verses.text: Salute Urbane, our helper in Christ, and Stachys my beloved.
